name: Editor Tweaks
description: Uniform editor line geometry (indent mode, aligned indent guides) plus Thymer's native hover controls tuned: click-to-zoom, custom cursors, and collapsed-line cleanups.
instructions: Open Plugin: Editor Tweaks from the command palette. Indent mode aligns regular text to the bulleted column; guide fixes keep indent guides on one column per depth. Hover a line: click the handle to zoom (⌥-click opens the menu), press-and-hold still grabs for drag. All behaviors are toggleable.
author: @akaready
